hooks.command: for start in "$PWD" "$CODEX_PROJECT_DIR"; do dir="$start"; if [ -z "$dir" ]; then continue; fi; if [ -f "$dir" ]; then dir=$(dirname "$dir"); fi; dir=$(cd "$dir" 2>/dev/null && pwd -P) || continue; while :; do if [ -d "$dir/.frontload" ]; then exec frontload hook pre-tool-use --host codex; fi; parent=$(dirname "$dir"); if [ "$parent" = "$dir" ]; then break; fi; dir="$parent"; done; done; exit 0

for start in "$PWD" "$CODEX_PROJECT_DIR"; do dir="$start"; if [ -z "$dir" ]; then continue; fi; if [ -f "$dir" ]; then dir=$(dirname "$dir"); fi; dir=$(cd "$dir" 2>/dev/null && pwd -P) || continue; while :; do if [ -d "$dir/.frontload" ]; then exec frontload hook post-tool-use --host codex; fi; parent=$(dirname "$dir"); if [ "$parent" = "$dir" ]; then break; fi; dir="$parent"; done; done; exit 0
